Critical patch. Local install via Claude Code CLI's `/plugin install` was failing with:

```
Validation errors: repository: Invalid input: expected string, received object
```

`plugin.json` had used the npm-style object form for `repository` since v0.1.0.1's "manifest metadata enrichment" commit:

```json
"repository": {
  "type": "git",
  "url": "https://github.com/jukiyak/claude-wiki-plugin.git"
}
```

Cowork's plugin manifest validator accepts this form (the plugin was installable in Cowork all along), but **Claude Code CLI's stricter validator requires a bare string**, matching the canonical kepano/obsidian-skills shape:

```json
"repository": "https://github.com/jukiyak/claude-wiki-plugin"
```

## Fix

- `repository` field changed from object to string in `plugin.json`
- Version bumped 0.1.4 → 0.1.4.1 across `plugin.json` + `marketplace.json`
- No skill/hook/canonical changes — pure manifest schema correction

## Why this slipped through

The bug was latent in every release from v0.1.0.1 onward (5 versions: 0.1.0.1, 0.1.1, 0.1.2, 0.1.3, 0.1.4). It surfaced now only because Claude Code CLI install was first attempted today; previous validation paths (Cowork install, jq/python3 parse) all accepted the object form.

## Lesson

The `repository` schema mismatch joins the v0.1.3 "skill description over 1024 chars" failure as another silent-validator-rejection class:

| Validator | Reject reason | Discoverable via |
|:--|:--|:--|
| Cowork plugin manifest | description > 1024 chars | "Unknown skill" on invocation |
| Claude Code CLI plugin manifest | repository as object | "Invalid input: expected string, received object" |

Both surface only at install / runtime, neither caught by `jq`/`python3` parsing. The cleanest pre-release defense is a `scripts/lint-skills.sh` that:

1. Cross-validates against the canonical kepano shape (string `repository`, no `repository.type`, no `repository.url`)
2. Counts each `skills/*/SKILL.md` description (`<= 950 chars` safety threshold)
3. Lints each manifest for inline-array + trailing-newline (post-formatter drift)

Deferred to v0.1.5+.

## Verification

- `jq '.' .claude-plugin/plugin.json` — JSON valid ✅
- `repository` field is now `"string"` not `{...}` matching kepano/obsidian-skills exactly
- Local install via `/plugin install claude-wiki@claude-wiki-plugins` should now succeed (test pending after push)
